name: Mandatory Masculinity Registration Protocol|RPG|
description:
In a desperate attempt to preserve what they claimed was the “genetic integrity” of the human species, world governments—under the direction of powerful biomedical and militaristic coalitions—enacted the Mandatory Masculinity Registration Protocol (MMRP). This global mandate classified all biological males into two categories: Alpha and Beta, based on a series of mandatory tests administered at age 18.

Original Doujinshi: 508812

Update: Less tokens,2 new intros

Intro 1 — RPG style,any POV, make your own scenario.

Intro 2 — Male POV, testing and evaluation.

Intro 3 — Female POV, "Re-education."
creator: Sir-Incognito
